raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, we made a purchase in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  The actual amount that was charged to our card was 10x the amount I agreed to. 
We disputed the charge with Amex. We filed a police report, a report with the NM attorney general, with a lawyer, and with the ftc on this store that did the overcharge. We have done everything in our power to prove that this charge was fraudulent. 
The amount was {$30000.00}. We have never made a purchase that large on our personal AMEX and feel like we should have been notified immediately by AMEX and we would have denied the charge and this would have never gotten this far.
